statement: Two affine subspace translates are equal iff the subspaces are equal and the difference lies in them.
lean_statement:
theorem addCoset_eq_iff
    {K V : Type*} [Field K] [AddCommGroup V] [Module K V]
    (U1 U2 : Submodule K V) (v1 v2 : V) :
    v1 +ŠĶ• (U1 : Set V) = v2 +ŠĶ• (U2 : Set V) ‚ÜĒ
      U1 = U2 ‚ąß v1 - v2 ‚ąą U1
proof:
Proof: if `v1 +ŠĶ• U1 = v2 +ŠĶ• U2`, then translating by `-v1` gives `U1 = (v2 - v1) +ŠĶ• U2`. Since
`0 ‚ąą U1`, we have `0 ‚ąą (v2 - v1) +ŠĶ• U2`, so `v1 - v2 ‚ąą U2`. Hence also `v2 - v1 ‚ąą U2`, and adding
an element of `U2` does not change the translate, so `(v2 - v1) +ŠĶ• U2 = U2`. Therefore `U1 = U2`,
and then `v1 - v2 ‚ąą U1` as well.

Conversely, if `U1 = U2` and `v1 - v2 ‚ąą U1`, then `v1 = v2 + u` for some `u ‚ąą U1`, so
`v1 +ŠĶ• U1 = (v2 + u) +ŠĶ• U1 = v2 +ŠĶ• U1 = v2 +ŠĶ• U2`. Hence the translates are equal.
